landing.title: Welcome
landing.subtitle: This is your app's home page. Replace it with your own content — the admin area lives under /admin.

maintenance.title: Under maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: The site is temporarily unavailable. Please check back soon.
maintenance.adminHint: Administrators can sign in to manage the site.

setup2fa.title: Set up two-factor authentication
setup2fa.subtitle: This site requires two-factor authentication. Add an authenticator app to continue.
setup2fa.enableFailed: Couldn't start setup. Please try again.

auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for a sign-in link.
auth.twoFactorPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.twoFactorBackupPrompt: Enter one of your backup codes.
auth.twoFactorInvalidCode: That code isn't valid. Check it and try again.
auth.twoFactorLocked: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.idleLogout: You were signed out after a period of inactivity. Sign in to continue.
auth.name: Name
auth.publicSignupDisabled: Public sign-up is closed. Existing users can still sign in.
auth.resetDesc: We'll send a reset link to your email.
auth.resetSent: If that email exists, a reset link is on its way.
auth.verifyDesc: We sent a verification link to {email}. Open it to activate your account.
auth.verifyDescNoEmail: Enter your email to receive a new verification link.
auth.verifySent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
auth.verifyLinkError: That verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one below.
auth.emailNotVerified: Verify your email before signing in.
auth.approvalPendingDesc: Your account was created and is waiting for an administrator to approve it. Try signing in again after approval.
auth.approvalPending: Your account is waiting for administrator approval.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Passwordless sign-in with your device (Face ID, fingerprint, security key).
passkeys.name: Name

acceptInvitation.title: Organization invitation
acceptInvitation.error: This invitation is invalid or has expired.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Multi-tenant teams. Create organizations and invite members.
organizations.name: Name
organizations.managersHint: Existing users to add as managers (any number).

consent.title: Authorize access
consent.subtitle: An application is requesting access to your account.
consent.requests: It will be able to access:

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Personal keys for programmatic access. Send as an x-api-key header.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.createdDesc: Copy it now — you will not be able to see it again.

general.brandingDesc: The site name and icon shown in the browser and across the app.
general.siteNameHint: Used as the browser tab title and wherever the app name appears.
general.faviconHint: SVG (recommended) or a square PNG 512×512, ≤ 1 MB. Applied to every page.
general.iconTooBig: Icon must be 1 MB or smaller.
general.appearanceDesc: Choose the base colors and corner style for the app. Changes apply after you save.
general.accentColorHint: Replaces the theme's primary color. Leave it empty to use the theme color.
general.previewBody: Colors and corner styles are shown here before you save.
general.infoDesc: Optional details used in meta tags, the footer, and links.
general.descriptionPlaceholder: A short tagline for your site
general.maintenanceDesc: Show a maintenance page to non-admins.
general.allowSignupDesc: Turn off to make the app invite-only.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Which authentication features are enabled, and how they are configured.
settings.authFeaturesSubtitle: Toggle sign-in methods and security features. Changes apply immediately.
settings.serverConfigSubtitle: Set through environment variables and applied at startup (read-only).
settings.emailPasswordDesc: Sign in with an email address and password.
settings.emailVerificationDesc: Require new sign-ups to confirm their address.
settings.signupApprovalDesc: Require an administrator to approve new self-registered users. Disabling this only affects future registrations.
settings.magicLinkDesc: Passwordless sign-in via an emailed link.
settings.emailOtpDesc: Passwordless sign-in with an emailed code.
settings.usernameDesc: Let users sign in with a username instead of an email.
settings.multiSessionDesc: Let one browser stay signed into several accounts and switch between them.
settings.phoneNumberDesc: Register and verify a phone number via SMS (configure a provider for real delivery).
settings.apiKeyDesc: Let users create personal API keys for programmatic access.
settings.passkeyDesc: Let users register passkeys for passwordless sign-in.
settings.organizationDesc: Multi-tenant organizations with members and email invitations.
settings.oidcProviderDesc: Act as an identity provider so other apps can sign in with this one.
settings.twoFactorDesc: TOTP second factor with backup codes.
settings.require2faDesc: Every user must enrol in 2FA after signing up before using the app.
settings.autoLogoutDesc: End sessions after a period without user activity.
settings.autoLogoutDialogDesc: Choose how long a signed-in user can remain inactive. The policy applies to every account and open browser tab.
settings.autoLogoutHint: Enter a whole number from 5 to 10080 minutes (7 days).
settings.breachCheckDesc: Reject passwords found in known breaches (Have I Been Pwned).
settings.accountDeletionDesc: Let users delete their own account.
settings.signInSubtitle: How users authenticate. Toggle methods on/off; social providers open a popup for credentials.
settings.emailSubtitle: Outgoing mail (SMTP) and the email-verification policy.
settings.securitySubtitle: Second factor, automatic logout, breached-password rejection, account deletion, and audit logging.
settings.advancedSubtitle: API keys, organizations, and acting as an OIDC identity provider.
settings.socialSubtitle: Paste OAuth credentials to enable sign-in with a provider. Applied immediately — no restart. Secrets are stored encrypted.
settings.smtpSubtitle: Outgoing mail for sign-in links, verification, and invitations. Applied immediately.
settings.socialDialogDesc: Paste the OAuth client ID and secret from the provider's console, then enable it. Applied immediately.
settings.socialCardDesc: Sign in with Google, GitHub, Apple and other OAuth providers.

account.title: Account
account.name: Name
account.twoFactorDesc: Add a one-time code from your authenticator app at sign-in.
account.scanHint: Add this to your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
account.backupCodes: Backup codes — store them somewhere safe
account.backupCodesHint: Each code works once if you lose your authenticator. Save them now — they won't be shown again.
account.regenerateBackupCodesHint: Generating a new set invalidates your previous backup codes.
account.connectedDesc: Link social accounts to sign in with them.
account.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: This permanently deletes your account and cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
account.emailChangePending: Check your current inbox to approve the change
